chapter_title: Turning and Stopping and Turning Signals
text: Any signal of intention to turn right or left shall be given continuously during the last 100 feet traveled by the vehicle before turning.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 11. RULES OF THE ROAD [21000 - 23336]
### Chapter 6. Turning and Stopping and Turning Signals [22100 - 22113]
##### § 22108

Any signal of intention to turn right or left shall be given continuously during the last 100 feet traveled by the vehicle before turning.

*(Enacted by Stats. 1959, Ch. 3.)*

subsections.text: Any signal of intention to turn right or left shall be given continuously during the last 100 feet traveled by the vehicle before turning.
